# rustfs_site_replication (Resource)

Manages RustFS site replication topology for the configured local RustFS site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "rustfs_site_replication" "example" {
  replicate_ilm_expiry = true

  peer = [
    {
      name       = "site-b"
      endpoint   = "https://site-b.example.com:9000"
      access_key = var.site_b_access_key
      secret_key = var.site_b_secret_key
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `peer` (Attributes List) Remote RustFS sites to configure for site replication. The local site is inferred by RustFS from the request endpoint. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--peer))

### Optional

- `replicate_ilm_expiry` (Boolean) Enable replication for ILM expiry rules across all configured sites.

### Read-Only

- `api_version` (String) Site replication API version reported by RustFS.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether RustFS reports site replication as enabled.
- `id` (String) Resource identifier. Site replication is global to the configured RustFS deployment, so this value is always `site-replication` and is the import ID.
- `service_account_access_key` (String) RustFS site replication service account access key.
- `site` (Attributes List) Sites currently reported by RustFS site replication. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--site))

<a id="nestedatt--peer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `peer`

Required:

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive) Administrator access key for the remote site, used by RustFS while joining peers.
- `endpoint` (String) Remote RustFS site endpoint, including scheme and port.
- `name` (String) Remote site name.
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) Administrator secret key for the remote site, used by RustFS while joining peers.


<a id="nestedatt--site"></a>
### Nested Schema for `site`

Read-Only:

- `api_version` (String) Site replication API version reported by RustFS.
- `default_bandwidth_limit` (Number) Default bandwidth limit per bucket in bytes per second.
- `default_bandwidth_set` (Boolean) Whether a default bandwidth limit is set.
- `default_bandwidth_updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp for the last bandwidth setting update.
- `deployment_id` (String) Immutable RustFS deployment ID for the site.
- `endpoint` (String) Site endpoint.
- `name` (String) Site name.
- `object_naming_mode` (String) Object naming mode reported by RustFS.
- `replicate_ilm_expiry` (Boolean) Whether ILM expiry replication is enabled for the site.
- `sync_state` (String) Synchronous replication state for the site.
- `tables_replica_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the site is acting as a tables replica site.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# The import ID is the fixed singleton ID "site-replication".
terraform import rustfs_site_replication.example site-replication
```
